description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push to tags matching 'v*' or the master branch. Run a windows-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, determines if the workflow is running for a tag, sets up MSBuild, and builds a solution for Win32, x64, and ARM64 platforms. Then, build an installer, upload artifacts, and if running for a tag, create a release, upload the release binary, pack symbols, and upload release symbols.
